title: USEC_CLOSEMSG
text: USEC_CLOSEMSG Builds the messages that are used in the disconnection protocol. Use SMTP security drivers Expected Input Properties , Parameters InBuf , InDataLen , InBufLen DrvArea Expected Output OutBuf , OutDataLen , OutBufLen ErrMsg , ErrMsgLen DrvArea Return Status USEC_SUCCESS USEC_ERROR Description The USEC_CLOSEMSG function is called when the connection is to be closed. It builds the messages that are used in the disconnection protocol. The function is called repeatedly with the server’s responses until it indicates that the protocol is complete or has failed. USEC_CLOSEMSG is the counterpart of USEC_OPENMSG , which provides more information about the way these functions should be used. Related Links USEC_OPENMSG Prepares the messages that are to be sent to the server in order to carry out the initialisation and authentication protocol to establish a connection.
